variants.title: WT1748
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WT1748. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WT1748 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Outer Diameter: 78.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 40.5 mm, Length: 248.0 mm, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Seal: Nitrile
